skills.name: infiniedit-element-manager
skills.description: Add, edit, delete, and search elements in an Infinite Craft save file, directly in the browser via WebMCP.

skills.name: infiniedit-recipe-manager
skills.description: Create crafting recipes linking ingredient elements to a result element in an Infinite Craft save.

skills.name: infiniedit-save-analysis
skills.description: Get statistics on an Infinite Craft save: element/recipe counts, duplicates, unreachable elements, and dead ends.

skills.name: infiniedit-dedupe
skills.description: Find and merge exact-duplicate elements (same name and emoji) in an Infinite Craft save.
